thought: Generating complete 6-week experimental protocol for CRISPR knockout screen in T cells for T cell depletion genes
action: Generating 6-week CRISPR knockout screen in T cells for T cell depletion genes schedule and detailed instructions based on protocol template

result.title: Generated 6-week CRISPR knockout screen in T cells for T cell depletion genes protocol
details: Week 1-2: Library cloning and lentivirus production
Week 3-4: T cell transduction and selection
### **CRISPR Knockout Screen in T Cells for T Cell Depletion Genes (6-Week Protocol)**
- Use high-fidelity sgRNAs targeting essential depletion genes (e.g., *CD3*, *TCRα/β*, *CD3ζ*, *ZAP-70*) with validated off-target scores.
- High-purity CD3+ T cells (95%+ purity) are required; use negative selection to avoid contaminating non-T cells.
- Optimize Cas9/sgRNA delivery (lenti/Crispr-PX459) via spinoculation or electroporation for maximal transduction (>80% efficiency).
- Use puromycin or blasticidin for 3–5 days post-transduction to enrich for CRISPR-modified cells.
- Maintain T cell viability with IL-2 (50–100 U/mL) and CD3/CD28 beads for 4–5 weeks to ensure functional expansion.
result.experiment_type: CRISPR knockout screen in T cells for T cell depletion genes
